name: Data Ingestion - Jager OLAP (Postgres to Motherduck)

parameters.query:
CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS s_reddit;
CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS s_slack;
CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS s_substack;
CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS s_yahoo_finance;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS s_reddit.subreddits_monitored (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
    active BOOLEAN,
    rules TEXT,
    title VARCHAR(255),
    updated_at TIMESTAMP,
    icon VARCHAR(1024),
    created_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS s_reddit.posts (
    id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
    subreddit_id INTEGER,
    author VARCHAR(255),
    title VARCHAR(1024),
    content TEXT,
    url VARCHAR(2048),
    score INTEGER,
    created_at TIMESTAMP,
    processed INTEGER
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS s_reddit.comments (
    id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
    post_id VARCHAR(255),
    author VARCHAR(255),
    content TEXT,
    score INTEGER,
    created_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS s_slack.workspaces_monitored (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    workspace_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
    workspace_name VARCHAR(255),
    active BOOLEAN,
    created_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS s_slack.channels_monitored (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    workspace_id INTEGER,
    channel_id VARCHAR(255),
    name VARCHAR(255),
    active BOOLEAN,
    created_at TIMESTAMP,
    UNIQUE(workspace_id, channel_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS s_slack.messages (
    id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
    channel_db_id INTEGER,
    author VARCHAR(255),
    content TEXT,
    url VARCHAR(2048),
    created_at TIMESTAMP,
    processed INTEGER
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS s_substack.feeds_monitored (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
    feed_url VARCHAR(1024),
    active BOOLEAN,
    created_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS s_substack.posts (
    id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
    feed_id INTEGER,
    feed_name VARCHAR(255),
    author VARCHAR(255),
    title VARCHAR(1024),
    link VARCHAR(2048),
    content TEXT,
    published_at TIMESTAMP,
    processed INTEGER
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS s_yahoo_finance.stock_prices (
    symbol VARCHAR(50),
    price_timestamp TIMESTAMP,
    open_price DECIMAL(18,4),
    high_price DECIMAL(18,4),
    low_price DECIMAL(18,4),
    close_price DECIMAL(18,4),
    volume BIGINT,
    PRIMARY KEY (symbol, price_timestamp)
);

INSERT INTO s_reddit.subreddits_monitored (id, name, active, rules, title, updated_at, icon, created_at)
VALUES ({{ $json.id }}, '{{ $json.name }}', {{ $json.active }}, '{{ $json.rules }}', '{{ $json.title }}', '{{ $json.updated_at }}', '{{ $json.icon }}', '{{ $json.created_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  name = EXCLUDED.name,
  active = EXCLUDED.active,
  rules = EXCLUDED.rules,
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at,
  icon = EXCLUDED.icon;

INSERT INTO s_reddit.posts (id, subreddit_id, author, title, content, url, score, created_at, processed)
VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', {{ $json.subreddit_id }}, '{{ $json.author }}', '{{ $json.title }}', '{{ $json.content }}', '{{ $json.url }}', {{ $json.score }}, '{{ $json.created_at }}', {{ $json.processed }})
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  subreddit_id = EXCLUDED.subreddit_id,
  author = EXCLUDED.author,
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  url = EXCLUDED.url,
  score = EXCLUDED.score,
  processed = EXCLUDED.processed;

INSERT INTO s_reddit.comments (id, post_id, author, content, score, created_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', '{{ $json.post_id }}', '{{ $json.author }}', '{{ $json.content }}', {{ $json.score }}, '{{ $json.created_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  post_id = EXCLUDED.post_id,
  author = EXCLUDED.author,
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  score = EXCLUDED.score;

INSERT INTO s_slack.workspaces_monitored (id, workspace_id, workspace_name, active, created_at)
VALUES ({{ $json.id }}, '{{ $json.workspace_id }}', '{{ $json.workspace_name }}', {{ $json.active }}, '{{ $json.created_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (workspace_id) DO UPDATE SET
  workspace_name = EXCLUDED.workspace_name,
  active = EXCLUDED.active;

INSERT INTO s_slack.channels_monitored (id, workspace_id, channel_id, name, active, created_at)
VALUES ({{ $json.id }}, {{ $json.workspace_id }}, '{{ $json.channel_id }}', '{{ $json.name }}', {{ $json.active }}, '{{ $json.created_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, channel_id) DO UPDATE SET
  name = EXCLUDED.name,
  active = EXCLUDED.active;

INSERT INTO s_slack.messages (id, channel_db_id, author, content, url, created_at, processed)
VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', {{ $json.channel_db_id }}, '{{ $json.author }}', '{{ $json.content }}', '{{ $json.url }}', '{{ $json.created_at }}', {{ $json.processed }})
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  channel_db_id = EXCLUDED.channel_db_id,
  author = EXCLUDED.author,
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  url = EXCLUDED.url,
  processed = EXCLUDED.processed;

INSERT INTO s_substack.feeds_monitored (id, name, feed_url, active, created_at)
VALUES ({{ $json.id }}, '{{ $json.name }}', '{{ $json.feed_url }}', {{ $json.active }}, '{{ $json.created_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET
  feed_url = EXCLUDED.feed_url,
  active = EXCLUDED.active;

INSERT INTO s_substack.posts (id, feed_id, feed_name, author, title, link, content, published_at, processed)
VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', {{ $json.feed_id }}, '{{ $json.feed_name }}', '{{ $json.author }}', '{{ $json.title }}', '{{ $json.link }}', '{{ $json.content }}', '{{ $json.published_at }}', {{ $json.processed }})
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  feed_id = EXCLUDED.feed_id,
  feed_name = EXCLUDED.feed_name,
  author = EXCLUDED.author,
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  link = EXCLUDED.link,
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  published_at = EXCLUDED.published_at,
  processed = EXCLUDED.processed;

INSERT INTO s_yahoo_finance.stock_prices (symbol, price_timestamp, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume)
VALUES ('{{ $json.symbol }}', '{{ $json.price_timestamp }}', {{ $json.open_price }}, {{ $json.high_price }}, {{ $json.low_price }}, {{ $json.close_price }}, {{ $json.volume }})
ON CONFLICT (symbol, price_timestamp) DO UPDATE SET
  open_price = EXCLUDED.open_price,
  high_price = EXCLUDED.high_price,
  low_price = EXCLUDED.low_price,
  close_price = EXCLUDED.close_price,
  volume = EXCLUDED.volume;
